Why Choose Sam Captures

Our Services

Professional photography services tailored to your unique needs and vision

💑

Wedding Photography

Capture the magic of your special day with our comprehensive wedding photography. From intimate ceremonies to grand receptions, every emotion is documented beautifully.

  • ✓ Full day coverage (8–12 hours)
  • ✓ Multiple angles & perspectives
  • ✓ Edited gallery of 300+ photos
  • ✓ Pre-wedding session included
Inquire Now
📸

Portrait Sessions

Professional portraits for individuals, families, and groups. From personal headshots to creative personal branding — crafted to reflect your personality.

  • ✓ 1–2 hour session
  • ✓ Custom styling consultation
  • ✓ 50–80 edited photos
  • ✓ Print release included
Inquire Now
🎉

Event Photography

Professional coverage for corporate events, birthdays, conferences, and special occasions. We capture the energy and highlights of your event with precision.

  • ✓ Flexible hours (4–10 hours)
  • ✓ Full event coverage
  • ✓ Rapid photo delivery
  • ✓ Digital & print options
Inquire Now
🎬

Cinematic Shoot

Movie-grade visuals for fashion, brands, and art projects. Drama, perfect lighting, and emotion — every single frame tells a powerful story.

  • ✓ 4-hour dedicated session
  • ✓ 80+ edited photos
  • ✓ Cinematic color grading
  • ✓ Behind-the-scenes included
Inquire Now
👗

Fashion & Editorial

Fashion photography and editorial shoots for brands, models, and fashion professionals. Creative direction and styling guidance for stunning editorial content.

  • ✓ Professional styling direction
  • ✓ Location scouting & planning
  • ✓ Portfolio-ready images
  • ✓ Commercial licensing options
Inquire Now
👔

Corporate Photography

Professional photography for corporate needs — team photos, product photography, office environments, and corporate event coverage for your brand.

  • ✓ Headshots & team photos
  • ✓ Office & facility photography
  • ✓ Product showcase photos
  • ✓ Commercial licensing available
Inquire Now

Frequently Asked Questions

What's your turnaround time for photos?

For most sessions, edited photos are delivered within 1–2 weeks. Rush delivery is available for an additional fee. Weddings typically take 3–4 weeks for a complete edited gallery.

Do you travel for shoots outside Sangli?

Yes! I cover shoots across Maharashtra and can travel to other states. Travel and accommodation charges will be discussed during the consultation.

Can we reschedule if something comes up?

Absolutely. I understand life happens. One free reschedule is allowed with at least 2 weeks' notice. Additional changes may incur a small fee.

Do you provide high-resolution files?

Yes! All packages include high-resolution, print-ready digital files delivered via Google Drive or WeTransfer.

What is your cancellation policy?

Cancellations 30+ days before the event receive a full refund. Cancellations within 30 days forfeit 50% of the booking fee. Cancellations within 14 days forfeit 100%.

How do I confirm my booking?

A 30% advance payment confirms your booking. The remaining amount is due on or before the day of the shoot.
